scenarios.name: Typed payment errors per failure mode
scenarios.rationale: Baseline used plain TS discriminated unions and try/catch without Effect's tagged-class + catchTag pattern, while the treatment surfaced the error union in Effect.Effect<S,E,R> and dispatched on _tag.

scenarios.name: Swap Prisma for fakes via DI
scenarios.rationale: Baseline relied on constructor injection or factory patterns; treatment defined Context.Tag, supplied Layer.succeed for live and test, and ran with Effect.provide.
